message:
fix(runtime): CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING return OK, PAUSE accepts negative timeout

- CLIENT TRACKING ON/OFF: return OK (matching Redis behavior) instead of
  error about unsupported tracking
- CLIENT CACHING YES/NO: return OK instead of error
- CLIENT PAUSE: accept negative timeout (treated as 0, matching Redis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
